channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump to meet with top weapons executives
item.description: President Trump will host executives from weapons manufacturers for a meeting at the Oval Office on Wednesday, a source familiar with the matter said.

item.title: Obama-appointed judge blocks Trump's obesity initiative as White House vows to continue fight
item.description: An Obama-appointed judge struck down the Trump administration's SNAP soda ban, ruling that the USDA cannot redefine what Congress has defined as food.

item.title: Emotional Starmer steps down in UK as Burnham gains support: 89% demand immediate election
Alaska Senate race in turmoil as same-name candidate challenges disqualification
item.description: Alaska's election director blocked Dan J. Sullivan from the Senate primary due to a name conflict, but he has filed a lawsuit to stay on the ballot.
